summary: Completed testing of eye-toggle re-render bug fix on Wallet Home screen. The bug was identified and fixed: the motion.div with AnimatePresence was preventing immediate visual updates. Simplified the animation approach by removing AnimatePresence and key prop, allowing React to update content immediately.
passed_tests: Eye toggle updates both primary and secondary balance displays immediately when clicked
Toggle state remains stable through 12+ seconds (longer than 8s polling interval)
Toggle state persists across navigation (to /transactions and back)
Backend API correctly persists hide_balance preference
No interference from refreshBalance polling (8s interval)
